overview: Atlas Learning Hub is an educational platform with blogs, notes, videos, AI tutoring, and role-based dashboards for creators, students, and admins.
features: Blogs with rich editor, likes, comments, and bookmarks
Videos with shorts and long-form player
AI Tutor chat with markdown rendering and conversation history
Creator, Student, and Admin dashboards with real analytics charts
Global search with filters and recommendations
Internet Identity authentication with four roles
Dark and light themes with responsive mobile layouts
